subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that there is no God but Him. He giveth life and causeth death, causeth death and giveth life, and He, verily, is the One, the Single [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد قلمی الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو یحیی و یمیت یمیت و یحیی و هو الفرد الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
